title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pratham Education

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pratham Education
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
